subcodes.first_line: How glorious that the Sun of loving-kindness hath dawned and the Luminary of grace doth, in every moment, shine resplendent with most wondrous beauty, while the clouds of generosity pour forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبذا آفتاب عنایت مشرق و نیر فضل در کل حین بابدع طراز ظاهر و باهر سحاب کرم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
